chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-772 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 08.11.2016. None present for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G = Petitioner and his Counsel are called absent. Learned A.A.G has already filed his parawise comments, wherein it has been undertaken by the police officials that they will provide protection to the petitioner, if same is requested for. It is further stated that no criminal case is registered against the petitioner. This petition is disposed of with the directions that police officials will provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law, if they are approached with such a request by the petitioner and the private respondent No.3-Muhammad Aamir is further directed to desist from causing any harassment to the petitioner. JUDGE Shahid
